title: Webusaiti ya IATF
summary: Webusaiti ya anthu onse ya International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: Bungwe la IATF linafunikira malo okhazikika amene angafotokoze chitsanzocho, kulemba mndandanda wa mapulojekiti, ndi kulozera anthu amene akuthandiza pa sitepe yotsatira yoyenera.
why: Tsambali ndi khomo lolowera pagulu la IATF. Linapangidwa ngati polojekiti yaying'ono kuti ikhale yosavuta kuwerenga, kumasulira, ndi kusunga poyera.
scopeIn: Masamba otsegulira anthu omwe amafotokoza za mtundu wa IATF
Kulembetsa pagulu la ntchito za IATF zovomerezeka, zogwira ntchito, ndi zosungidwa ndi udindo, woyang'anira, malo osungira, ndi chiwonetsero
Masamba a kayendetsedwe ka boma ndi kuwonekera poyera
Buku la Chingelezi lokhala ndi dongosolo lokonzeka kumasuliridwa
Static kukhazikitsa pa Cloudflare Antchito Static Chuma
scopeOut: Madera a mamembala achinsinsi, maakaunti, kapena mayendedwe olowera
Kusunga kachidindo koyambira pulojekiti, komwe kumakhala m'malo osungira polojekiti iliyonse
Kuyankhulana kwa nthawi yeniyeni, komwe kumakhala mu Discord
Nkhani kutsatira kwa ntchito payekha, amene amakhala mu ntchito iliyonse GitHub nkhokwe

title: IATF selfie
summary: Chitsanzo choyambirira cha IATF, chosungidwa pambuyo pofika poyimitsa mwachilengedwe.
problem: Kufufuza koyambirira kwa chida choyang'ana kupezeka pansi pa ambulera ya IATF.
why: Malo osungiramo zinthu amasungidwa pagulu ngati mbiri ya ntchitoyi, ngakhale chitukuko cholimba chaimitsidwa.
scopeIn: Chitsanzo choyambirira cha chida chopezekapo chomwe chimasungidwa ngati mbiri ya anthu onse

title: IATF bot
summary: A IATF gulu bot, kusungidwa pambuyo kufika yachibadwa amasiya mfundo.
problem: Makina ozungulira njira zamagulu a IATF.
why: Malo osungiramo zinthu amasungidwa pagulu ngati mbiri ya ntchitoyi, ngakhale chitukuko cholimba chaimitsidwa.
scopeIn: Kusagwirizana kwa makina kuzungulira njira zamagulu a IATF, zosungidwa ngati mbiri yapagulu
